title: denial_validation_result.json -- denial reasons validated against case evidence v0.1
description: Produced by denial-validation's checkpoint 1 (Evidence retrieval + validation). For each denial reason in denial_reason_result.json, whether the case's own evidence actually supports the insurer's stated reason.

verdict.description: insufficient_evidence is distinct from not_supported: the evidence contradicts the insurer's reason (not_supported) vs. there isn't enough evidence either way (insufficient_evidence, likely not rebuttal-worthy).

verdict_explanation.description: Hedged reasoning per P3 -- this is an inference, not a restatement.

retrieved_chunk_ids.description: PoC dev-phase requirement: every chunk id (from page_chunks.json) retrieval surfaced for this reason, not just what got cited below. Revisit whether this stays required post-PoC.

evidence_references.description: Final cited evidence backing the verdict. May be empty only when verdict is insufficient_evidence.

allOf.description: Rule: any verdict other than insufficient_evidence must cite at least one evidence_reference.
